creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-06-01 00:08:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11/dzen2            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Dzen is a general purpose messaging, notification and menuing program
  for X11. It was desigend to be scriptable in any language and
  integrate well with window managers like dwm, wmii and xmonad though
  it will work with any windowmanger.
  
  WWW: http://gotmor.googlepages.com/dzen
  
  PR:             ports/124011
  Submitted by:   Morten Slot Kristensen
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.683     +1 -0      ports/x11/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/x11/dzen2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11/dzen2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/x11/dzen2/pkg-descr (new)
